verses.text: His law he enforces: the stars in their courses, the sun in its orbit, obediently shine; the hills and the mountains, the rivers and fountains, the deeps of the ocean proclaim him divine. We too should be voicing our love and rejoicing, with glad adoration a song let us raise, ‘til all things now living unite in thanksgiving to God in the highest, hosana and praise! 1939, 1966 E. C. Schirmer Music Co.
